name: Incorrect Short Circuit Evaluation
description: A product's conditional expression contains multiple logical sub-expressions where non-leading expressions produce side effects. Short-circuit evaluation may skip these side effects, leaving the program in an unexpected state that attackers could exploit.
detection_pattern: CONTROL(conditional_expression) contains TRANSFORM(side_effect_operation) in a non-leading position of a short-circuit logical expression (&&, ||). When the leading condition short-circuits, the TRANSFORM side effect is skipped, leaving STORAGE(program_state) inconsistent.
